20.reason: [Error: puts() outputs the string as a single line without spaces between digits. The problem requires each integer to be separated by a space, e.g., "1 2 3", not "123". This causes incorrect output format.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: puts() outputs the string as a single line without spaces between digits. The problem requires each integer to be separated by a space, e.g., "1 2 3", not "123". This causes incorrect output format.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: puts(s) outputs the string without spaces between digits, but the expected output requires each integer separated by a space. For example, for N=3, the output should be "1 2 3" not "123".]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Output format incorrect: should print numbers separated by spaces (e.g., "1 2 3"), not concatenated digits.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  prints digits without spaces; correct output requires spaces between digits
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Does not print spaces between integers as required by the output format. Should use a loop to print characters separated by spaces.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The problem requires space-separated integers in the output, but puts(s) prints characters concatenated without spaces. Also, '0'+i produces incorrect characters for N=10.

5.reason: [Array size is too small; for N up to 10, indices 1..10 are used, but array has only 10 elements (0..9), causing out-of-bounds access when i=10]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Array size should be 11 to accommodate indices 1..N (N up to 10); accessing Mark[10] is out of bounds.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  array size too small; should be Mark[11] to allow index up to N (max 10)

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Array size is 10, but indices go up to N (max 10). Accessing Mark[10] causes out-of-bounds error. Should be Mark[11].
